title: --lint-only Unsupported: Unpacked array in packed struct

features.name: packed struct with unpacked array of packed struct
features.description: Code should include a packed struct declaration containing an unpacked array member where the array element type is a packed struct

features.name: packed struct with unpacked array of param-sized elementary type
features.description: Code should include a packed struct containing an unpacked array of a parameter-sized packed elementary type
